I love to write drum beats on my little drum machine. I’m extremely prolific to the point of being, like, crazy. I’m crazy anyway and I like that. I don’t wanna be normal. Normal people scare me. alignments.json_text: I don't believe society exists.
alignments.proposed_text: I don't believe society exists.

alignments.json_text: There's no such thing as society.

alignments.json_text: The idea of society is something that was used by parents and teachers
alignments.wiki_text: I don’t believe society exists. There’s no such thing as “society”. So— The idea of Society is something that was used by parents and teachers and clergymen and other authority figures in order to control children—as children are growing up, in order to believe that there’s something called Society. So that when they do grow up, they become, uh, complacent sheep and behave in these proscribed manners and—and build some sort of imaginary power structure that only benefits people in positions of power. But Power itself is an illusion. The only thing that Power means is that people agree somebody should be in power. And that’s how people like Jim Jones rise to Power. He gets a lot of people to agree that he should be in charge and that they should listen to him. And if you don’t like people like Jim Jones or Hitler or anybody in power, you don’t even fight with them. You just walk away from them and say, “I don’t need you. I don’t need your leadership. I don’t need you to tell me what to do.”
alignments.proposed_text: The idea of society is something that was used by parents and teachers
